rationale: This page provides specific historical and cultural information regarding the Rigveda, including its UNESCO Memory of the World inscription status, preservation locations, and its foundational role in Indian traditions. It is a clear content page suitable for generating questions.
cleanedText:
The Rigveda (Successfully inscribed in 2007)
* One of the oldest literary texts, the Rigveda is preserved on birch bark and paper in New Delhi and Pune.
* It contains hymns, myths, and rituals, forming the foundation of Vedic science, yoga, Ayurveda, and Sanskrit traditions.
